description: Create shared data layer (localStorage service + TypeScript interfaces) and update the dashboard sidebar navigation to link to all new pages. This is the foundation for all other features.
steps: Create app/lib/storage.ts - a centralized localStorage service with typed getters/setters for all data entities: transactions (expenses/income), budgets, savings goals, bills, debts, assets/liabilities. Each entity should have a well-defined TypeScript interface. Include helper functions for CRUD operations, date filtering, and category aggregation. Use localStorage keys prefixed with 'budgetwise_'. Include interfaces: Transaction (id, type: 'expense'|'income', description, amount, category, date, isRecurring, recurringFrequency?, notes?), Budget (id, category, limit, period: 'monthly'|'weekly'), SavingsGoal (id, name, targetAmount, currentAmount, deadline, color), Bill (id, name, amount, dueDate, frequency, category, isPaid, autoPay), Debt (id, name, totalAmount, remainingAmount, interestRate, minimumPayment, dueDate), Asset (id, name, value, type: 'cash'|'investment'|'property'|'other'), and Liability (id, name, amount, type: 'loan'|'credit_card'|'mortgage'|'other').
Create app/lib/utils.ts - utility functions for currency formatting, date formatting, percentage calculations, color generation for charts, and date range helpers (thisMonth, lastMonth, thisYear).

Update app/dashboard/layout.tsx - Replace the current NAV_ITEMS array with comprehensive navigation: Dashboard (/dashboard), Transactions (/dashboard/transactions), Budgets (/dashboard/budgets), Income (/dashboard/income), Savings Goals (/dashboard/savings), Bills & Recurring (/dashboard/bills), Reports & Analytics (/dashboard/reports), Net Worth (/dashboard/net-worth), Debts (/dashboard/debts), Calendar (/dashboard/calendar), Insights (/dashboard/insights), Settings (/dashboard/settings). Remove the 'comingSoon' pattern. Keep the existing sidebar/mobile responsive design pattern.
acceptance_criteria: app/lib/storage.ts exports typed CRUD functions for all entity types
Dashboard layout sidebar shows all 12 navigation items with proper links
Mobile navigation shows all items in horizontally scrollable nav
npm run build completes without errors
